scripts.build: npm run build -w @yellow-sub/sdk && npm run build -w @yellow-sub/api && npm run build -w @yellow-sub/admin-web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,admin "npm run dev -w @yellow-sub/api" "npm run dev -w @yellow-sub/admin-web"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @yellow-sub/api --if-present && npm run lint -w @yellow-sub/admin-web --if-present
